title: Clamp with range invariant
description: Clamp a value to [lo, hi]. The postcondition proves the result is always within bounds.
prompt: Write a Kodo module with a clamp function(val, lo, hi: Int) -> Int that requires lo <= hi and ensures result >= lo && result <= hi. Print clamp(3,1,10), clamp(-5,0,100), clamp(200,0,100).
